message:
perf(mux): add VA-API VPP GPU color conversion, resolution cap, and frame dropping

- Add VPP (Video Post-Processing) pipeline for GPU-accelerated BGRX→NV12
  color space conversion, eliminating CPU NV12 conversion
- Cap encode resolution to 2048 per dimension (MAX_DIM) to avoid
  vaCreateContext error 19 on GPUs with 4096 H.264 encode limit
- Use fixed-point 16.16 integer math for 2x2 box-filter downscaling
  with u32 word reads/writes for faster pixel processing
- Add browser-side frame dropping when decode queue exceeds 10 frames,
  with keyframe request to recover
- Use real timestamps for decode latency measurement in Panel.svelte
- Remove pipeline timing debug logs
